classifications.reason: Core BP selection logic - populates essential order defaults like price list, payment terms, warehouse
Organization change drives warehouse, document type, and numbering - fundamental to order creation
Cash VAT determination from location is needed but can be reduced to a simpler lookup without full SOTrx/org/BP matrix
Project-driven payment rules are not core to MVP order flow
Charge amount auto-population is basic data entry support needed for orders with charges
Document type drives sequencing, payment/invoice/delivery rules - essential for order processing
Price list currency and tax-inclusion flag must propagate to the order header
Product selection on lines must populate prices, UOM, tax - core line entry logic
Line amount recalculation on qty/price/discount changes is the heart of order line editing
Tax determination by location is essential for correct order totals
Charge tax lookup needed when charges are used on order lines
UOM conversion between alternate and base units is needed for correct quantity handling
Date change warning is useful but can be a simple confirmation dialog rather than full callout logic
Alternate UOM to base quantity conversion is essential for multi-UOM product ordering
Process Order (complete/void/reactivate) is the most critical process in the sales order flow
Cancel and Replace is an advanced workflow not needed for MVP
Payment processing is core to the sales order lifecycle
Copy lines is useful but MVP can use a simpler version without BOM explosion and hook transformations
Accounting posting is essential for financial completeness of the order flow
Promotions engine is a complex feature not needed for MVP
Document type filtering by SOTrx/org/return status is essential to show correct doc types
Price list filtering by sales/purchase type prevents selecting wrong price lists
BP location filtering to active ship-to addresses is basic data integrity
Organization security filtering is a framework requirement for multi-org access control
Tax filtering by date and SOTrx type ensures correct tax selection
Payment method filtering by pay-in/pay-out is needed for correct payment processing
Freight amount conditional visibility is simple display logic that keeps the UI clean
Gross unit price visibility tied to tax-inclusive price lists is essential for correct price entry
Cancel and Replace button visibility is moot since the process itself is omitted
Posted button visibility gated on processed status and accounting preference is standard behavior
